Defines constants and a macro for leap year calculation related to the epoch year.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines constants and a macro related to the Gregorian calendar and leap year calculations. The constants `EPOCH_YEAR`, `EPOCH_WDAY`, `EPOCH_YEARS_SINCE_LEAP`, `EPOCH_YEARS_SINCE_CENTURY`, and `EPOCH_YEARS_SINCE_LEAP_CENTURY` are used to represent the epoch year (1970) and its characteristics, such as the day of the week and the number of years since the last leap year, century, and leap century. The macro `isleap(y)` is defined to determine if a given year `y` is a leap year, using the rules of the Gregorian calendar. This file is useful for applications that require date and time calculations based on the epoch time.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `time.h`
